rationale: Educ. Code §28.014 governs college preparatory courses offered by school districts. It has no operative connection to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Sec. 28.014. COLLEGE PREPARATORY COURSES. (a) Each school district shall partner with at least one institution of higher education to develop and provide courses in college preparatory mathematics and English language arts.
_note: No conflict; rule is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
